questions.question: What is the difference between the Debug and Release settings for the Xcode Architecture?
questions.justification: The synthesis text clearly explains the difference between the Debug and Release settings for the Xcode Architecture.

questions.question: What is the recommended setting for the Xcode Architecture in Release mode?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the recommended setting for the Xcode Architecture in Release mode is 'No'.

questions.question: How can one resolve the 'segmentation fault: 11' error when building on an M1 Mac?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides a solution to the 'segmentation fault: 11' error, which is to set the 'Apple Clang - Code Generation --> Optimization Level' to 'None'.
